title: BudgetEntry
description: Agent-local cognitive budget tracking entry. Enforces the bio-aware 100 RU/24h resource budget.

remaining_ru.description: Remaining Resource Units in the current window (max 100 RU)

window_start.description: Holochain Timestamp marking the start of the current 24-hour budget window
